name: hct-palette-generator
description: Perceptually-even HCT color-palette generator — pure engine, <hct-app> web component, and Figma plugin.

scripts.build: npm run gen:figma-assets && npm run gen:travel-presets && tsc && vite build && npm run bundle && npm run gen:figma-ui
scripts.test: npm run gen:figma-assets && npm run gen:travel-presets && npm run bundle && npm run gen:figma-ui && node test/run.mjs
